commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: The city may mean the Church; the streets and ways the Holy Scriptures. watchmen: that is the holy angels or the holy Prophets and Apostles. (Theodoret of Cyrus) or the holy fathers who guard the Church's orthodoxy. (St. Gregory the Great, Rupert of Deutz, St. Bede)

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: City. To prevent fires God will require the souls of the flock at the hands of his pastors.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
